{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323174304197302579B757597887B"}"},"total":487},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7461592960023757630","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不是我吹，看这书的人，个个器宇轩昂，万人景仰，无人能及，玉树临风，内外兼备，才华横溢，情操高尚，超级无敌，炉火纯青，登峰造极，鬼斧神工，振聋发聩，烛照天下，明见万里，雨露苍生，泽被万方，鹰视狼顾，龙行虎步，英姿伟岸，高屋建领，仁义道德，风流倜傥，大公无私，貌似潘安，才比宋玉，一树梨花压海棠，人有你有，人无你有，一身正气，两袖清风，德厚流光，赤子之心，高山景行，高情远致，厚德载物，功德无量金美玉，明德惟馨，怀瑾握瑜，蕙心纨质，沅草沣兰，志士仁人，云中白鹤，风华正茂，风流人物，伏龙凤雏，盖世无双，盖世英雄，矫矫不群，桂林一枝，鹤鸣之士，加人一等，举世无双，金榜题名，昆山片玉，绝世超伦","text_exts":[{"e":145,"s":138,"text":"一树梨花压海棠","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E6%A0%91%E6%A2%A8%E8%8A%B1%E5%8E%8B%E6%B5%B7%E6%A3%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742589857597887B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227461592960023757630%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227424439472776825880%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E6%A0%91%E6%A2%A8%E8%8A%B1%E5%8E%8B%E6%B5%B7%E6%A3%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737292133,"group_id":"7424439472776825880","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没什么好介绍的，就一个普通人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2DVx6fbR/mSgXLNuUGs3PA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ec1ba7ffec3f44b8854d0c70c6357a32~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791640&x-signature=7qyePv1%2B1%2BNuU%2BS0ul23gSmjtGw%3D","user_id":"782448628075991","user_name":"川流不息之山海见"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"782448628075991","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":0,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7424439472776825880","book_info":{"abstract":"李少明穿越到神明满天飞的斩神世界，在沧南老住宅区角落里坐拥一家平平无奇的罐子商店。

十来天无人问津，正当心灰意冷之际。

赵空城闪亮登场，十个罐子开出本命禁墟“泯生闪月”，这一世，他不会再死。

接下来，有了赵空城这个引子，罐子店逐渐热闹。

红缨：“姐自从有了罗喉传承，杀性是越来越大了。”

小南：“什么诡计之神，等开出神物来，杀上阿斯加德斩了洛基。”

林七夜：“说出来你们可能不信，脑海里不仅有个精神病院，又从罐子里开出一座戏台，戏台下还有七个神明等着接管身体。”

陈牧野：“守了沧南十年，我该休息一...嗯？我没死？”

斩神世界的走向有了李少明带着罐子店出现，画风完全变了一个样，那些遗憾不会再有。

李少明也交上了一大堆朋友，每天上上班，口花花，日子过得好不快活。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0edaddcfe6f970ca53df56bfe20c6e22","author":"爱吃葱爆鱼片的康楼主","author_id":"","book_id":"7424439472776825880","book_name":"斩神：罐子批发商，老赵开出禁墟","book_short_name":"斩神罐子商","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#504840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7424439511200842264","read_count":"11903","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1069501"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"502","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,同人,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a95b7b9b13034f42264726907ca5f641~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442985&x-signature=zoEEDXfhp1OGACGyR1eHpmI9xWk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2414165088550548","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"462"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323174304197302579B75759788
